english_query: the way to help yourself think about hard questions step by step
ugf_response:
When you want to know if something is true or if something is good, your mind can get lost. The hard thing is that your mind can get lost in a big, hard thing. It is hard to see the whole picture when it is too big for one mind to hold. To fix this, you must find a way to break the big thing into many small things. This is how you move from a place of not knowing to a place of knowing.

First, you must look at the big thing and find the small parts that make it up. If you try to think about the whole thing at once, your head will feel full and you will stop. You must take the big thing and make it into many small things. Each small thing must be easy to see and easy to understand. You must ask yourself what each small part is and how it works.

Second, you must look at each small part one by one. Do not move to the next part until you feel you know the first part well. Ask yourself if the small part is true. Ask yourself why it is true. If you do not know if the small part is true, you cannot move to the next part. You must be very careful to make sure each small part is right before you move to the next one.
